title: SetBCCList
text: SetBCCList Specify one or more email addresses of recipients of a blind carbon copy. SetBCCList ( BCCList ) Parameters Parameter Type Direction Description BCCList string In Uniface list of email addresses, with GOLD ; as the separator; maximum of 10240 bytes Return Values Table 1. Values returned in $status Value Description 0 Operation succeeded -18 Memory allocation error <0 An error occurred Example Explain this code mailApiHandle->SetBCCList(BCC.MESSAGE.NM) Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
